summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 驅動的電力基礎設施需求與策略性合資擴張，儘管估值偏高，但分析師仍持續上調目標價。

bullish.title: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Quanta Services, Raises Price Target to $940
bullish.reason: 分析師 Jamie Cook 維持買入評級，並將目標價大幅上調至 $940，顯示市場對其成長動能的高度信心。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Joins Hyosung HICO To Build High Voltage Breakers In The US
bullish.reason: 與 Hyosung HICO 成立合資企業生產高壓斷路器，直接切入美國電力基礎設施升級的關鍵供應鏈。

bullish.title: Bull of the Day: Quanta Services (PWR)
bullish.reason: Zacks 將其評為「今日看漲個股」，強調其在歷史性能源需求與關鍵基礎設施建設中的領先地位。

bullish.title: Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) Gains Growth Momentum with Index Shift and PT Raise
bullish.reason: 獲得機構投資人 Peconic Partners 的青睞，且指數權重調整與目標價上調進一步強化了成長動能。

bearish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Stock Looks Stretched Following Raised Outlook And AI Demand
bearish.reason: 儘管基本面強勁，但長期股價漲幅過大導致估值偏高，提醒投資人需注意過熱風險。

bearish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Declines More Than Market: Some Information for Investors
bearish.reason: 單日股價下跌 3.98%，表現弱於大盤，反映短期獲利了結賣壓。

neutral.title: Is Index Reclassification And A New Grid JV Altering The Investment Case For Quanta Services (PWR)?
neutral.reason: 探討指數權重調整（從價值型轉向成長型指數）對投資組合的影響，屬於中性市場結構調整。

neutral.title: BCKIY or PWR: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
neutral.reason: 僅為兩檔股票的價值比較分析，未對公司基本面產生直接影響。
